data.content: Implemented pool-agent swap in Settings > Dispatch > Pools: each step now has left dropdown of current pool agents, right dropdown of all selectable agents, and a Swap action that replaces agentId in-place while preserving weight/order and preventing duplicate/no-op swaps. Added shared swapPoolAgent helper and unit tests for success + invalid cases. Quality gates: bun run lint passed (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit passed, bun run test passed, bun run build failed due pre-existing Next prerender/runtime issue on /_global-error and /registry (TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading useContext)). Commit pushed to origin/main.
